title: lastrea cristata
intro: Lastrea cristata, also known as the Christmas fern, is a species of evergreen fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea cristata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as arthritis and cancer. Herbal preparations of Lastrea cristata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
